title: Validation of the EORTC QLQ-C30 and the FACT-G for assessing health-related quality of life among adult cancer patients in Cameroon.
abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the psychometric properties of the French and English versions of the European Organization for Research and Treatment of Cancer Quality of Life Questionnaire Core 30 (EORTC QLQ -C30) and Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy-General (FACT -G) among adults with cancer in Cameroon.
